change.item: Removed hardcoded default URLs from module parameters.
Added neutral example URLs as field hints and descriptions.
Aligned the Joomla update server XML with the JoomTheme release structure.
Added SHA256 validation to the update XML.
Internationalized the extension identity for JED and global users.
Changed the manifest name and description to English.
Kept the Turkish language pack as a secondary translation.

fix.item: Added GPL license headers to PHP files for JED Checker compliance.
Added update server and changelog URL information to the manifest file.
